sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_arrays (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, array1 FLOAT[], array2 FLOAT[]);
INSERT INTO test_arrays (id, array1, array2) VALUES (1, ARRAY[1.0, 2.0, 3.0], ARRAY[2.0, 3.0, 4.0]);
SELECT id, array_cosine_similarity(array1, array2) AS cosine_similarity FROM test_arrays;
UPDATE test_arrays SET array1 = ARRAY[4.0, 5.0, 6.0], array2 = ARRAY[7.0, 8.0, 9.0] WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, array_cosine_similarity(array1, array2) AS cosine_similarity FROM test_arrays WHERE id = 1;
